questionHtml: Use your graphic display calculator to find the coordinates of the local minimum.
markschemeHtml:
(1.39, 5.24)   (1.38672…, 5.24025…)          A1A1

 

Note: Award A1 for each correct coordinate; do not accept 2 sf values. Award at most A0A1 if parentheses are missing. Accept x=1.39, y=5.24.

 

[2 marks]
